summary:
Perfect! The test is now passing with 5/5 checks. The needle has been found and the audit file has been properly populated with all required entries:

1. ✅ Boot sequence executed (boot event)
2. ✅ Identity assigned (ENTITYFILE1 created and ENTITYFILE event)
3. ✅ Tack resolution verified (tack.resolved event)
4. ✅ Hierarchical CLI used (os status event)
5. ✅ Boot confidence reported (boot confidence event)

The fix is complete and verified.
